ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #7, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Nov-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng, via Zoom, for and with Kathryn L. Simpson, Conservator/Trustee.

The court confirms that the Department of Health Care Services has not appeared today, nor are there any other appearances, to object to the instant petition. The court declares that it has equitable power to allow for fees previously excluded without invoking relief via CCP 473(d) and confirms with Ms. Ng that her client acknowledges that she may likely not receive additional fees due to the Estate's shortfall.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Kevin Urbatsch to appear on November 19, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he has not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. If Mr. Urbatsch fails to appear on that the date, sanctions in the amount of $1,500.00 will be imposed. The accounting petition is also continued to that date.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for Kathryn Simpson.

Mr. Urbatsch stated that the law firm was not hired on a contingency basis but on an hourly basis, that they were hired by the Trustee and that the word "supervision" instead of "jurisdiction" was entered in the title of the petition by mistake. In addition, he stated that the Trustee was acting under the terms of the Trust, that she did not realize that she needed Court authorization/approval, that the only reason it was filed in probate was because she needed to file the bond and that Ms. Huyc (Public Benefits Consultant) was hired to assist in the law suit. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Continued To Feb-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee, Kathryn Simpson, and her Attorney, Kevin Urbatsch, for failure to appear at today's hearing and failure to file the first accounting. The return date is February 22, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204. If the first accounting is not on file by February 22, 2010 or there are no appearances on February 22, 2010 then sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will be charged against Counsel and/or the Trustee.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli
